Bash(PGPASSWORD=changeme psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -U peopleflow -d peopleflow -c "
SELECT 
  COUNT\(*\) as total_records,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT userid\) as unique_users,
  MIN\(recordedat\) as earliest,
  MAX\(recordedat\) as latest,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT recordedat::date\) as distinct_dates
FROM geolocation;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=changeme psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -U peopleflow -d peopleflow -c "
SELECT 
  recordedat::date as day,
  to_char\(recordedat, 'Dy'\) as dow,
  COUNT\(*\) as records,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT userid\) as users
FROM geolocation
GROUP BY recordedat::date
ORDER BY day;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=changeme psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -U peopleflow -d peopleflow -c "
SELECT 
  recordedat::date as day,
  to_char\(recordedat::date, 'Dy'\) as dow,
  EXTRACT\(DOW FROM recordedat::date\) as dow_num,
  COUNT\(*\) as records,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT userid\) as users
FROM geolocation
GROUP BY recordedat::date
ORDER BY day;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=changeme psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -U peopleflow -d peopleflow -c "
-- 曜日別の平均ユーザー数
SELECT 
  EXTRACT\(DOW FROM recordedat::date\) as dow_num,
  CASE EXTRACT\(DOW FROM recordedat::date\)
    WHEN 0 THEN '日'
    WHEN 1 THEN '月'
    WHEN 2 THEN '火'
    WHEN 3 THEN '水'
    WHEN 4 THEN '木'
    WHEN 5 THEN '金'
    WHEN 6 THEN '土'
  END as dow,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT recordedat::date\) as day_count,
  ROUND\(AVG\(sub.users\)\) as avg_users,
  ROUND\(AVG\(sub.records\)\) as avg_records
FROM \(
  SELECT recordedat::date as day, COUNT\(DISTINCT userid\) as users, COUNT\(*\) as records
  FROM geolocation
  GROUP BY recordedat::date
\) sub
JOIN geolocation g ON g.recordedat::date = sub.day
GROUP BY EXTRACT\(DOW FROM recordedat::date\)
ORDER BY dow_num;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=changeme psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -U peopleflow -d peopleflow -c "
-- 土日 vs 平日の内訳（2025-03-01/02 を除く、通常の土日と比較）
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN EXTRACT\(DOW FROM day\) IN \(0, 6\) THEN '土日'
    ELSE '平日'
  END as day_type,
  COUNT\(*\) as day_count,
  ROUND\(AVG\(users\)\) as avg_users,
  ROUND\(AVG\(records\)\) as avg_records
FROM \(
  SELECT recordedat::date as day, COUNT\(DISTINCT userid\) as users, COUNT\(*\) as records
  FROM geolocation
  WHERE recordedat::date NOT IN \('2025-03-01', '2025-03-02'\)
  GROUP BY recordedat::date
\) sub
GROUP BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN EXTRACT\(DOW FROM day\) IN \(0, 6\) THEN '土日'
    ELSE '平日'
  END;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=changeme psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -U peopleflow -d peopleflow -c "
-- 2025-03-01/02 は特異な大規模データ（イベント日想定）
SELECT 
  recordedat::date as day,
  to_char\(recordedat::date, 'Dy'\) as dow,
  COUNT\(DISTINCT userid\) as users,
  COUNT\(*\) as records
FROM geolocation
WHERE recordedat::date IN \('2025-03-01', '2025-03-02'\)
GROUP BY recordedat::date
ORDER BY day;
" 2>&1)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=changeme psql -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5433 -U peopleflow -d peopleflow -c "
-- 実データのイベント日が土曜と仮定した場合、同じ曜日（土曜）が何日あるか
SELECT recordedat::date as day, COUNT\(DISTINCT userid\) as users
FROM geolocation
WHERE EXTRACT\(DOW FROM recordedat::date\) = 6
GROUP BY recordedat::date
ORDER BY day;
" 2>&1)
